description_for_human: Access the Emergent Ontology knowledge base — a universal grammar of change built on nine primitive operators.
description_for_model: Emergent Ontology (EO) is a theoretical framework proposing that all structural change reduces to nine primitive operators: NUL (absence), SIG (designation), INS (instantiation), SEG (segmentation), CON (connection), SYN (synthesis), ALT (alternation), SUP (superposition), REC (recursion). This API provides read-only access to wiki articles, blog posts, experiments, documents, and pages about EO. Use /api/manifest.json for full endpoint listing, /api/index.json for the site index, and /api/content/{id}.json for individual content items.
